label: Global record configuration
description: Global recording and retention settings applied to cameras unless overridden per-camera.

enabled.label: Enable record on all cameras
enabled.description: Enable or disable recording globally; individual cameras can override this.

expire_interval.label: Number of minutes to wait between cleanup runs
expire_interval.description: Minutes between cleanup passes that remove expired recording segments.

days.label: Default retention period
days.description: Days to retain recordings triggered by motion.

pre_capture.label: Seconds to retain before event starts

post_capture.label: Seconds to retain after event ends

pre_capture.label: Seconds to retain before event starts

post_capture.label: Seconds to retain after event ends

export.label: Recording Export Config
export.description: Settings used when exporting recordings such as timelapse and hardware acceleration.

hwaccel_args.label: Export-specific FFmpeg hardware acceleration arguments
hwaccel_args.description: Hardware acceleration args to use for export/transcode operations.

preview.label: Recording Preview Config
preview.description: Settings controlling the quality of recording previews shown in the UI.

quality.label: Quality of recording preview
quality.description: Preview quality level (very_low, low, medium, high, very_high).

enabled_in_config.label: Keep track of original state of recording
enabled_in_config.description: Indicates whether recording was enabled in the original static configuration.
